title: Support for attributes according to Verilog 2005 standard

features.name: attribute on module port connection
features.description: Code should include an attribute specification (* attribute_name *) applied to a port connection signal in a module instantiation
features.snippet: bar bar_instance ( (* clock_connected *) clk, rst, (* this_is_the_input *) inp, out);

features.name: attribute on function call argument
features.description: Code should include an attribute specification (* attribute_name *) applied before function call arguments

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
